## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Teero and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/3Awch69oRJXjPXLFsojREq6PCzwmAyvg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance up \~2% week-over-week; 40/\~80 commercial panels updated](https://fathom.video/share/3Awch69oRJXjPXLFsojREq6PCzwmAyvg?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [8 new articles (including W2 content) ready for publishing tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/3Awch69oRJXjPXLFsojREq6PCzwmAyvg?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [API solutions (e.g., Glassdoor) being explored for salary data integration](https://fathom.video/share/3Awch69oRJXjPXLFsojREq6PCzwmAyvg?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [First HubSpot conversion tracked from dental hygiene temping job content](https://fathom.video/share/3Awch69oRJXjPXLFsojREq6PCzwmAyvg?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
